title: Brachycorythis henryi
taxonomy: Brachycorythis henryi is classified as a species of orchid in the family Orchidaceae. It belongs to the genus Brachycorythis, which is a group of terrestrial orchids primarily found in tropical regions. The genus Brachycorythis is part of the subfamily Orchidoideae, one of the largest subfamilies of orchids. Brachycorythis henryi is native to China, where it grows in mountainous areas. Further classification of Brachycorythis henryi also places it within the tribe Orchideae.
uses: Brachycorythis henryi is reported to have various medicinal uses, including being used to treat fever and other health issues.
